pages.text: $(bold)Sorting$() at scale:$(br)$(li)$(bold)Mechanical Arm$() — a configurable arm that picks from any number of inputs and places into any number of outputs, with per-target filters. One arm replaces a wall of funnels.$(li)$(bold)Brass Tunnel$() — sits on a belt and splits a stream across belts: round-robin, randomised, or filtered per side.
pages.title: Sorting
